title: Geodeopolis
description: Adds a few different geodes that can be used to make different cystals which can then be used to make different resources
body:
Adds a few different geodes that can be used to make different cystals which can then be used to make different resources

 

Currently adds tin, uranium, silver, osmium, copper, iron, gold and debris

   

All materials contain the budding and block varients as well as the small, medium and large cystals 

 

Budding block will also grow the correct crystals

 

World gen is WIP
